Container.Name: shelflife
Container.Overview: Manage your Plex library storage. Users log in via Plex to vote on keeping or deleting content they requested through Seerr, Overseerr, or Jellyseerr. Admin gets a dashboard showing what can be pruned. Only SESSION_SECRET is required — all services can be configured in Admin > Settings after first login.
Container.Description: Shelflife - Library storage management. Connect to Seerr, Overseerr, or Jellyseerr and Tautulli to let users vote on which requested content to keep or delete.

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Random string for JWT signing (minimum 32 characters). Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: URL of your Seerr instance (optional — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Seerr API key (optional — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Overseerr URL
Config.Description: URL of your Overseerr instance (legacy fallback — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Overseerr API Key
Config.Description: Overseerr API key (legacy fallback — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Jellyseerr URL
Config.Description: URL of your Jellyseerr instance (legacy fallback — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Jellyseerr API Key
Config.Description: Jellyseerr API key (legacy fallback — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: URL of your Tautulli instance (optional — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Tautulli API Key
Config.Description: Tautulli API key (optional — can also be configured in Admin > Settings)

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: URL of your Sonarr instance (optional — enables TV show deletion from admin)

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: URL of your Radarr instance (optional — enables movie deletion from admin)

Config.Name: Plex Client ID
Config.Description: Unique client identifier for Plex auth (keep default unless running multiple instances)

Config.Name: Admin Plex ID
Config.Description: Force a specific Plex user ID as admin (optional - first user to sign in becomes admin if unset)

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Path to SQLite database inside container
